## Meeting Purpose

Follow-up discussion between FOSSA and GrowthX to clarify SOW details and align on expectations for potential SEO and outbound campaign partnership.

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX's SEO approach: 4-5 weeks to establish content cadence, then optimize based on performance signals](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [90-day pilot period with 30-day notice; effectively 60 days to cancel before 12-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [FOSSA seeks clear ROI indicators within 60-90 days to justify continued investment](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Stackshare property requires long-term investment to recover traffic and leverage 4.5M backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Outbound campaigns to be highly targeted, leveraging pain points and valuable content](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)

## Topics

### SEO Strategy and Expectations

  - [GrowthX focuses on building high-quality content inventory and publication cadence (4-5 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Subsequent phases: monitor performance signals, optimize, and double down on what works](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [FOSSA seeks tangible results within 60-90 days to justify continued investment](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Marcel emphasized the "rising tide effect" and long-term value of consistent, high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Stackshare Property Potential

  - [4.5 million backlinks present significant opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Traffic declined \~90% since November; recovery requires substantial, programmatic effort](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [Long-term investment (full year) needed to rebuild and leverage the property's value](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Challenge: aligning Stackshare traffic intent with FOSSA product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)

### Outbound Campaign Approach

  - [GrowthX handles setup, IP warming, lead lists, and targeting](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [FOSSA to provide input on audiences, messaging, and past successful strategies](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Emphasis on targeted, pain point-focused campaigns (e.g., industry-specific vulnerabilities)](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Horizontal (DevOps persona) vs. vertical (industry-specific) approach to be determined](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)

### Reporting and Collaboration

  - [Weekly updates and syncs](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Performance reports (e.g., built in Looker)](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Collaborative content review process](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [Shared examples of client growth curves and inflection points](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

## Next Steps

  - FOSSA to make a decision on partnership this week
  - Potential deeper dive into outbound campaigns with Jimmy from GrowthX
  - [If proceeding, aim for March 17 start date (based on GrowthX's current booking schedule)](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [Further discussion needed on balancing targeted (vertical) vs. broader (horizontal) outbound campaign approach](https://fathom.video/share/zxUo_DRziyB23A3j_q9DT4P4jvWdzzeq?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
